Description.SourceString: The GSW-AR is a short-stroke piston-guided assault rifle manufactured by the NSDG. Its modular design allows the shooter to select various types of barrels, grips, and attachments according to their needs; with appropriate modifications, the GSW-AR can be adapted to almost any space engagement scenario.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-AR is a short-stroke piston-guided assault rifle manufactured by the NSDG. Its modular design allows the shooter to select various types of barrels, grips, and attachments according to their needs; with appropriate modifications, the GSW-AR can be adapted to almost any space engagement scenario.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-DMR is a designated marksman rifle produced by NSDG that uses the 8.32x57mm caseless cartridge to provide greater single-shot power at the cost of rate of fire. The GSW-DMR is suitable for medium to long range engagement situations.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-DMR is a designated marksman rifle produced by NSDG that uses the 8.32x57mm caseless cartridge to provide greater single-shot power at the cost of rate of fire. The GSW-DMR is suitable for medium to long range engagement situations.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-IDW is a personal defense weapon produced by NSDG that provides a high level of sustained firepower in the most compact gun space possible and is suitable for close quarter combat.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-IDW is a personal defense weapon produced by NSDG that provides a high level of sustained firepower in the most compact gun space possible and is suitable for close quarter combat.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-SMG is a high rate of fire submachine gun with a special structural design to counteract recoil during continuous fire, making it very effective in close quarters combat.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-SMG is a high rate of fire submachine gun with a special structural design to counteract recoil during continuous fire, making it very effective in close quarters combat.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-SG is a shotgun produced by NSDG, which swaps the location between magazine and the barrel for easier reloading. By swapping different types of ammunition, the GSW-SG can adapt to a variety of engagement environments.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-SG is a shotgun produced by NSDG, which swaps the location between magazine and the barrel for easier reloading. By swapping different types of ammunition, the GSW-SG can adapt to a variety of engagement environments.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-MG is a general purpose machine gun produced by NSDG. Using a bullet chain feed, the MG is capable of pouring out sustained fire at medium range. In special cases, the MG can also be fed with a special magazine.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-MG is a general purpose machine gun produced by NSDG. Using a bullet chain feed, the MG is capable of pouring out sustained fire at medium range. In special cases, the MG can also be fed with a special magazine.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-PSR is a bolt-action sniper rifle produced by NSDG that is capable of effectively killing enemies at medium to long range.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-PSR is a bolt-action sniper rifle produced by NSDG that is capable of effectively killing enemies at medium to long range.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-PSR-C is a compact sniper rifle that, despite its low power, can be used with surprising effect when used properly.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-PSR-C is a compact sniper rifle that, despite its low power, can be used with surprising effect when used properly.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-AMR is a semi-automatic anti-material sniper rifle produced by NSDG, which has great power and also has a very high recoil.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-AMR is a semi-automatic anti-material sniper rifle produced by NSDG, which has great power and also has a very high recoil.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-FOP is a pistol produced by NSDG that uses the Metal Storm, which is a powerful, penetrating pistol that can effectively penetrate astronaut helmets.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-FOP is a pistol produced by NSDG that uses the Metal Storm, which is a powerful, penetrating pistol that can effectively penetrate astronaut helmets.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-PCC is a pistol caliber carbine with excellent accuracy and stability, suitable for medium to close range combat.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-PCC is a pistol caliber carbine with excellent accuracy and stability, suitable for medium to close range combat.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-CDP is a compact space crew pistol produced by NSDG. Although its performance is not outstanding, its low cost and large production volume have made it a handy weapon for many space employees.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-CDP is a compact space crew pistol produced by NSDG. Although its performance is not outstanding, its low cost and large production volume have made it a handy weapon for many space employees.

Description.SourceString: The GSW-CARKIT is a carbine pistol based on the CDP modification, with a one-piece heat suppressor that effectively reduces the heat signature when firing and an extended magazine compartment that allows the weapon to hold more ammunition.
Description.LocalizedString: The GSW-CARKIT is a carbine pistol based on the CDP modification, with a one-piece heat suppressor that effectively reduces the heat signature when firing and an extended magazine compartment that allows the weapon to hold more ammunition.

Description.SourceString: Based on the world's most prolific assault rifle, Vityaz replaced its entire wooden structure with alloy for thermal considerations, making it capable of handling the space combat environment at minimal modification cost.
Description.LocalizedString: Based on the world's most prolific assault rifle, Vityaz replaced its entire wooden structure with alloy for thermal considerations, making it capable of handling the space combat environment at minimal modification cost.

Description.SourceString: A light machine gun that adapts to long continuous fire, with excellent fire continuity and penetration capability.
Description.LocalizedString: A light machine gun that adapts to long continuous fire, with excellent fire continuity and penetration capability.

Description.SourceString: VAP-9 is a 9mm submachine gun independently developed by Vityaz, low price, good handling and easy access to 9mm pistol rounds make it popular among space pirates, but due to its low bullet velocity, making it difficult to be competent in long-range combat.
Description.LocalizedString: VAP-9 is a 9mm submachine gun independently developed by Vityaz, low price, good handling and easy access to 9mm pistol rounds make it popular among space pirates, but due to its low bullet velocity, making it difficult to be competent in long-range combat.

Description.SourceString: The classic rifle that once took the world by storm is able to continue to adapt to the space combat environment after a simple modification.
Description.LocalizedString: The classic rifle that once took the world by storm is able to continue to adapt to the space combat environment after a simple modification.

Description.SourceString: APS is a classic personal defense weapon using the 9x18mm Makarov pistol round, and despite the fact that muzzle jump is a major problem, the high rate of fire allows it to gain a considerable advantage in close quarters combat.
Description.LocalizedString: APS is a classic personal defense weapon using the 9x18mm Makarov pistol round, and despite the fact that muzzle jump is a major problem, the high rate of fire allows it to gain a considerable advantage in close quarters combat.

Description.SourceString: Although originally designed for astronauts to survive after landing, as the space situation rapidly changed, more adaptations for outer space operations came to LEO with the space elevator. Currently, the TP82 is capable of loading two rounds of 12.5x70mm shotshell, which is sufficient for close range engagement situations.
Description.LocalizedString: Although originally designed for astronauts to survive after landing, as the space situation rapidly changed, more adaptations for outer space operations came to LEO with the space elevator. Currently, the TP82 is capable of loading two rounds of 12.5x70mm shotshell, which is sufficient for close range engagement situations.

Description.SourceString: The SVD is a semi-automatic sniper rifle using 7.62x54 ammunition, and although it lags slightly behind the performance of modern sniper rifles, its low conversion cost, high rate of fire, and excellent reliability make it a trusted choice for many space employees.
Description.LocalizedString: The SVD is a semi-automatic sniper rifle using 7.62x54 ammunition, and although it lags slightly behind the performance of modern sniper rifles, its low conversion cost, high rate of fire, and excellent reliability make it a trusted choice for many space employees.

Description.SourceString: JUG-12 is a 12-Gauge shotgun that can fire in either semi-automatic or fully automatic mode, allowing it to handle a variety of engagement situations by changing barrels and ammunition types.
Description.LocalizedString: JUG-12 is a 12-Gauge shotgun that can fire in either semi-automatic or fully automatic mode, allowing it to handle a variety of engagement situations by changing barrels and ammunition types.

Description.SourceString: A heavy anti-tank weapon that can only be loaded one round at a time and can kill in one hit in the vast majority of cases.
Description.LocalizedString: A heavy anti-tank weapon that can only be loaded one round at a time and can kill in one hit in the vast majority of cases.
